_description: PitchBook advanced-search criteria codes. Used by pitchbook-advanced-search script (--criteria flag).

ops._description: URL segment after the field path. Determines body shape. Range fields use separate '.min' and '.max' sub-fields, each set independently.
ops.string: String-valued filter (dates as ISO 'YYYY-MM-DD'). Body: {value: '<string>', requestType: 'STRING', updateType: 'SET_VALUE'}. Used for range sub-fields like company.dateFounded.min / .max, and single-value strings like company.location.type.
ops.money: Currency-valued filter. Body: {value: {amount: <number>, currency: 'USD', asOfDate: 'YYYY-MM-DD'}, requestType: 'MONEY', updateType: 'SET_VALUE'}. Used for range sub-fields like deal.round.amount.min / .max, company.totalRaised.min / .max.
ops.integer: Integer-valued filter. Body: {value: <int>, requestType: 'INTEGER', updateType: 'SET_VALUE'}. Used for .trailingDays sub-fields on date ranges.
ops.boolean: Boolean-valued filter. Body: {value: true|false, requestType: 'BOOLEAN', updateType: 'SET_VALUE'}. Used for .trailing toggles on date ranges.
ops.industry-query: Tree/logical-operation filter for industries, verticals, keywords, emerging spaces. Only used with company.industryQueryCriteria. Body shape: see industryQuery below.

trailingDateRanges._description: Instead of min/max dates, use a trailing window ('last N days'). Send TWO criteria entries per date range: set .trailingDays (integer op) then set .trailing=true (boolean op). Any pre-existing .min/.max values stay ignored while .trailing=true. Works on any date range field (deal.round.localDateRange, company.dateFounded, etc.).

businessStatus._description: Operational status of the business. 'Company Status' tab > 'Business Status' section in UI.

codes.BUSINESS_STATUS: (Meta — 'All Business Statuses' checkbox. Only pass if selecting all, otherwise omit.)

industryQuery._description: Body shape for field=company.industryQueryCriteria op=industry-query. Supports boolean trees across keywords, industries, verticals, emerging spaces.
_notes: queryItems can contain a mix of TERM_ITEM entries and nested LOGICAL_OPERATION subtrees (for CUSTOM mode).
For a KEYWORD term, code is the literal keyword string (e.g. 'devtools', 'developer tools').
primaryIndustry=true restricts the match to a company's primary classification.
Simple OR-of-terms: use queryMode='OR' with a flat queryItems list.
Mixed AND/OR: use queryMode='CUSTOM' and nest LOGICAL_OPERATION items.

industries._description: Top-level PitchBook industry codes. Passed as TERM_ITEM with type=INDUSTRY.
industries._note: Sub-industries use longer numeric codes (e.g. '102100', '207020'). Discover via PitchBook UI or the /industry/counts endpoint.

verticals._description: Industry vertical codes. Passed as TERM_ITEM with type=VERTICAL. Same set as pitchbook-deal-feed verticals.

emergingSpaces._description: PitchBook emerging space codes. Passed as TERM_ITEM with type=EMERGING_SPACE. Codes are numeric; discover labels via PitchBook UI.

financingStatus._description: Company backing status. 'Company Status' tab > 'Backing Status' section in UI. Pass one or more codes as a collection.

ownershipStatus._description: Company ownership status. 'Company Status' tab > 'Ownership Status' section in UI.

locationType._description: How to interpret location codes. 'Location' tab > 'Headquarters' radio group in UI.

revenueRange._description: Revenue range filter. 'Financial Data' tab in UI. Confirmed body shape.

totalRaisedRange._description: Cumulative total capital raised across all rounds. Confirmed same shape as deal.round.amount.

dealDate._description: Deal date range ('most recent deal in range'). 'Deal Criteria' tab > 'Deal Date' in UI. Confirmed ISO date range.

dateFounded._description: Company year-founded filter. 'Other Criteria' tab > 'Year Founded' in UI. Range uses TWO separate API calls — one for .min and one for .max.
dateFounded._example: To filter companies founded between 2020-01-01 and 2026-01-01, send two criteria entries: one with field=company.dateFounded.min value='2020-01-01', one with field=company.dateFounded.max value='2026-01-01'.

dealRoundAmount._description: Deal round amount (per-round funding size). 'Deal Criteria' tab > 'Deal Size' in UI.
dealRoundAmount._note: asOfDate is typically today. Per-round, NOT total raised.

dealNewTypes._description: Deal types filter. Filters companies by the types of deals associated with them. Codes are shared with the pitchbook-deal-feed skill — see pitchbook-deal-feed/filter-codes.json for the full catalog of VC/MNA/PE codes, sub-stages, and presets.

_presets._description: Common preset code-lists mirrored from pitchbook-deal-feed/filter-codes.json for convenience.

pre-series-b._description: Pre-seed through Series A (everything before Series B). Matches the 'vc-early' preset in pitchbook-deal-feed.

series-b-plus._description: Series B and later stages. Matches 'vc-late' in pitchbook-deal-feed.

seed-only._description: Seed and pre-seed only. Matches 'vc-seed' in pitchbook-deal-feed.

sorting._description: Result set sorting. Uses a separate endpoint from criteria: POST /tables/{dataSetId}/columns/sorting with body [{order, columnId, hidden, nullsFirst}]. Set via --sort=<columnId> --sort-order=ASC|DESC on the search/results commands. Default sort is lastFinancingDate DESC. Discover all sortable columns with: node pitchbook-advanced-search.mjs columns <searchId>.

commonColumns.lastFinancingSize: Deal size of most recent round (MONEY)
commonColumns.lastFinancingDealType: Type of most recent round (e.g. Series A)
